figures.caption: Fig. 1: Distribution of per-trial best validation losses across HPO trials for each architecture (HeteroPNA excluded: only two valid trials out of 115 dispatched). X-axis labels report architecture name and valid/dispatched trial counts. Boxes span the 25th–75th percentile; whiskers extend to 1.5× the interquartile range; jittered points overlay individual trials; gold stars mark the best trial per architecture.
TABLE III: Typed edge relations in the heterogeneous OPF graph.
TABLE I: Positioning of the proposed HydraGNN-based OPF workflow relative to prior GNN-based OPF surrogates and recent OPF graph foundation-model efforts.
Fig. 3: FT1 feasibility classification: validation BCE loss vs. training epoch for HeteroSAGE (top row) and HeteroHEAT (bottom row) at four sample sizes.
Fig. 4: FT2 N−1 contingency regression: validation MSE loss versus training epoch for HeteroSAGE and HeteroHEAT across multiple labeled-data regimes.
